title: Evangelion X ANA AR Codes
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion X ANA AR Codes             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Sun Nov 25, 2012 11:01 pm http://sazanami.net/20121118-ana-evangelion-ar/ Does anyone have a copy or replica of the AR codes used for the ANA airport promotion. You can get the apps on the app store but as I don't live in Japan so I can't take advantage of it. So if someone has a copy of the mini AR code to make the mini Evas that would be the bee's knees.
